title: Prepare and publish the Conditional GO remediation release v0.5.39
rawUserRequest: 开始实施 2026-07-22 Conditional GO Review Remediation 全部计划，完成以后发布新版本；中途不要停止，要全部完成。此前 WI1-WI11 已按完整流程合并、归档、关闭并同步默认分支；现在明确授权完成最终发布工单和 v0.5.39 发布。

declaredIntent.summary: 修正 v0.5.39 发布前的 source/archive 自引用问题，生成可独立验证的发布证据，并在 PR 合并、ai-close-work-item 和默认分支同步后发布正式版本。

closure.evidence: make ai-close-work-item TASK=conditional_go_plan_cleanup reported ready for next Work Item on synchronized main; .ai/work-items/archive/2026/conditional_go_plan_cleanup.archive-manifest.json

outOfScope: Changing runtime governance behavior unrelated to release verification.
Publishing any tag before the PR is merged and ai-close-work-item succeeds.
Claiming enterprise security, identity, or compliance assurance.

sources.reason: Plan-level release requirement and completed WI1-WI11 evidence.
Predecessor closure evidence and ready-for-next state.
Quick Install public release verification contract.

riskAssessment.reason: Repository changes are bounded to fail-closed release evidence and metadata; external publication occurs only after merge and closure through the existing provider workflow.

executionDecision.reason: The user explicitly authorized full plan execution and final release publication; predecessor WI11 is closed and default main is synchronized.

preReviewWarnings: Do not publish a tag or release asset until all exact-source and public distribution checks pass.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Release metadata and workflow use an independently verifiable source identity and archive digest without self-referential commit or archive fields.
Quick Install and public distribution checks fail closed on tag, installer, archive, asset, SBOM, provenance, CI, or source mismatch; regression tests cover the contract.
v0.5.39 is prepared through a dedicated PR and merged only after the full Finish Gate and all required CI checks pass.
After merge, ai-close-work-item succeeds and the final release workflow publishes v0.5.39 with exact source, release assets, evidence bundle, and public distribution verification.
guidelines: Published claims must be backed by provider-bound evidence, not PR text or chat claims.
The release tag and assets must be immutable and source-bound.
Keep candidate, historical, verified, and published states distinct.

intent.problem: The current v0.5.39 candidate cannot be published safely because release.json still describes v0.5.38, while the workflow also requires commit/archive identities that cannot be embedded self-referentially in the same commit.
constraints: Do not weaken exact-source, archive, installer, CI, SBOM, provenance, or public-asset checks.
Do not create or publish a tag before PR merge and lifecycle closure.
Preserve all prior Work Item and release evidence.
intent.rationale: Move source identity to provider-bound release evidence/tag resolution and keep the committed public contract hashable, so v0.5.39 can be published with independently reproducible evidence.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Release metadata remains candidate-safe and the workflow rejects stale tags, source identity, archive, installer, or candidate projections.
Quick Install derives the exact tag target and rejects missing or mismatched public archive evidence.
A merged default-branch source can produce source-bound CI, SBOM, provenance, archive, and public release evidence before publication.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized full Conditional GO plan execution and final v0.5.39 publication in the current goal.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
